description: From her 2016 breakthrough album, Honest Life, to 2020’s Grammy-nominated, Old Flowers, Courtney Marie Andrews has been celebrated as an artist who challenges herself, and who finds new interplays of Folk and Americana. According to Andrews, her latest release, Valentine, is “a record in pursuit of love”. But love, it turns out, “is a lot more than I gave it credit for,” she explains. “It’s built over years, it’s built with trust, with changes, it becomes something new and unrecognizable, the deeper you go.”
title: Courtney Marie Andrews Concert
